title: vitis nesbittiana
intro: Vitis nesbittiana, also known as the Nesbitt grape vine, is a species of grapevine native to Mexico. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues and fever. The health benefits of Vitis nesbittiana include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion due to its high content of antioxidants and flavonoids. Vitis nesbittiana is often prepared in herbal teas or infusions to leverage its medicinal properties, and it can also be consumed as a juice or added to traditional remedies.
